title: Darlac Compact Plus Pruner - Razor Sharp, Lightweight Bypass Secateurs - Ideal for General & Fine Pruning, Flower Arranging - SK5 High Carbon Japanese Steel - Easy Use Catch - 20mm Cut Capacity
features: DARLAC COMPACT PLUS PRUNER – Slightly larger than our Compact Pruner, this strong yet lightweight tool is perfect for general pruning, and is precision tensioned for a precise, clean cut every time. Made from carbon steel with rust-resistant blades

EASE OF USE – Designed for more effortless gardening, the Darlac Compact Plus has a cut capacity of 20mm and a soft, non-slip grip. Its easy-to-use safety catch allows you to comfortably operate the pruners single-handedly if needed

RELIABLE AND DURABLE – We've designed our Darlac Compact Plus Pruner to last. With the right care, oiling, cleaning and sharpening, our pruners can last a lifetime. Replacement blades and springs are available

DESIGN INNOVATION - Darlac brings award-winning ideas and innovation to the world of gardening. Using our expertise to add ingenious and thoughtful touches to standard garden tools, we design and make products that are indispensable to any gardener

DARLAC GARDEN TOOLS – With over 55 years of cutting excellence, Darlac has built an unrivalled reputation for quality, service, and value with one of the widest ranges of cutting tools and gardening equipment available to the gardener today
description: From the manufacturer Over 55 years of innovation! The Darlac Tool Company was founded in 1963, and since then has built a reputation for quality, and value for money. After years of new and innovative product introduction, Darlac now has one of the widest ranges of cutting tools, hand tools, and watering equipment available to the gardener today – all backed by a dedication to quality. Darlac Compact Plus Pruner Lightweight for general pruning and flower arranging The Darlac Compact Plus Pruner is an ergonomically designed cutting tool of exceptional quality. Its strong yet lightweight construction from SK5 high carbon Japanese steel features rust-resistant hard chrome-plated blades. A great, versatile tool for general pruning, fine pruning and flower arranging. Offering a soft, non-slip grip, its compact design is ideal for easy carrying and storage so you can keep your pruners to hand wherever you are. SK5 high-carbon Japanese steel Rust-resistant hard chrome-plated blades Precision tensioned for a clean cut every time Suitable for general and fine pruning and flower arranging Darlac Expert Bypass
